People

CeDEx China brings together researchers, faculty members, and lab management with expertise in behavioural and experimental economics.

Leadership

Name Role Affiliation Research Focus
Professor Chris Starmer Chair, CeDEx Director University of Nottingham (UK) Experimental Economics
Professor Shravan Luckraz Co-chair, Director of CeDEx China School of Economics, UNNC Game Theory and Mathematical Economics

Name Role Affiliation Research Focus

Dr Marcus Roel Research Lead School of Economics, UNNC Behavioural and Experimental Economics

Dr Xuewen Qian Research Lead School of Economics, UNNC Game Theory and Economic Theory
